title: Figure Visual Findings
description: Written by the host model in step 6 after opening each extracted figure PNG. One entry per reviewed figure. Consumed by the Excellence/Impact passes (relevant figure findings) and report 04.

figure_type.description: e.g. project-at-a-glance, system-architecture, methodology, PERT/Gantt, impact-pathway, use-case

readability.description: label readability, text size, arrow visibility/direction, resolution, pixelation, cropping, overcrowding, contrast, legend.

understandability.description: purpose, visual hierarchy, reading direction, inputs/outputs, layers, relationships, arrow meaning, overall message.

content_consistency.description: Key Technology / Key Innovation / objective names consistent with the text; architecture/methodology/validation relationships consistent.

page_rendered.description: true if the page had to be rendered (render_page) to recover a vector figure.
